title: lastrea hunsteiniana
intro: Lastrea hunsteiniana, also known as the Hunstein's fern or Japanese autumn fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea hunsteiniana include the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Lastrea hunsteiniana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried for use in medicinal soups and decoctions.
